---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for 11 Avatar Digital Hub
title: '[FEATURE]: '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage-needed']
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Request

### 📝 Feature Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->
<!-- Example: "Add bulk email scheduling with timezone support for Indian businesses" -->

### 🎯 Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve -->
<!-- What pain point are you experiencing? How does this affect your workflow? -->

**Current Situation:**
[Describe how things work now and what's missing]

**Pain Points:**
1. [First pain point]
2. [Second pain point]
3. [Third pain point]

**Manual Workaround:**
[Describe any manual workarounds you currently use, if any]

### 💭 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->
<!-- Be as specific as possible - mockups, workflows, examples help! -->

**User Flow:**
1. User goes to '...'
2. User clicks on '...'
3. System performs '...'
4. User sees result '...'

**UI/UX Suggestions:**
<!-- Mockups, wireframes, or reference screenshots -->
[Describe the UI or attach mockups]

**Configuration Options:**
<!-- What settings/options should this feature have? -->
- Option 1: [description]
- Option 2: [description]

### 🔄 Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? -->
1. **Alternative A:** [description]
   - Pros: [list pros]
   - Cons: [list cons]
2. **Alternative B:** [description]
   - Pros: [list pros]
   - Cons: [list cons]

### 📊 Business Value

**Target Users:**
<!-- Who would benefit from this feature? -->
- [ ] All Users
- [ ] Admin / Managers
- [ ] Sales Team
- [ ] Support Team
- [ ] Finance Team
- [ ] Training Team
- [ ] Partners / Affiliates
- [ ] Clients / End Customers

**Use Cases:**
<!-- List specific business scenarios where this feature would be used -->
1. **Use Case 1:** [description]
   - Industry: [e.g., Real Estate, Education, IT Services]
   - Team Size: [e.g., Small (1-10), Medium (11-50), Large (50+)]
2. **Use Case 2:** [description]

**Expected Benefits:**
<!-- Quantify the expected benefits if possible -->
- Time Saved: [e.g., 2 hours/week per user]
- Efficiency Gain: [e.g., 30% faster invoice generation]
- Error Reduction: [e.g., Eliminates manual data entry errors]
- Revenue Impact: [e.g., Enables new upsell opportunity]

**Customer Requests:**
<!-- How many customers/users have asked for this? -->
- Number of requests: [approximate count]
- Priority for customers: [Low / Medium / High / Critical]

### 🏗️ Technical Considerations

**Module/Area Affected:**
<!-- Which parts of the application would be affected? -->
- [ ] Core (Auth, Users, RBAC)
- [ ] CRM (Leads, Clients, Contacts, Deals)
- [ ] Finance (Invoices, Payments, GST)
- [ ] Communication (WhatsApp, Email, SMS)
- [ ] Projects (Tasks, Projects, Time Tracking)
- [ ] Training (Courses, LMS)
- [ ] Reports & Analytics
- [ ] Integrations (Calendar, Maps, Slack, etc.)
- [ ] Settings & Administration
- [ ] Mobile / PWA
- [ ] API & Webhooks
- [ ] Other: [specify]

**Dependencies:**
<!-- Does this feature depend on other features or integrations? -->
- Internal dependencies: [list]
- External dependencies: [list third-party services]
- API changes required: [Yes/No, describe if yes]

**Data Requirements:**
<!-- What data would this feature need? -->
- New database collections/tables: [Yes/No, describe]
- New API endpoints: [Yes/No, describe]
- Data migration needed: [Yes/No]

**Performance Considerations:**
<!-- Any performance implications to consider -->
- Expected data volume: [e.g., thousands of records]
- Real-time requirements: [Yes/No]
- Batch processing needed: [Yes/No]

**Security Considerations:**
<!-- Any security implications -->
- New permissions needed: [Yes/No, describe]
- Data sensitivity: [Low / Medium / High]
- Audit logging required: [Yes/No]

### 📸 Reference & Inspiration

**Competitor Examples:**
<!-- Link to similar features in other products -->
| Product | Feature Link | Notes |
|---------|-------------|-------|
| [Product A] | [URL] | [What they do well / poorly] |
| [Product B] | [URL] | [What they do well / poorly] |

**Design Inspiration:**
<!-- Links to designs, articles, or concepts -->
- [Link 1 - description]
- [Link 2 - description]

**Attachments:**
<!-- Drag and drop any mockups, diagrams, or reference files here -->

### 📋 Implementation Priority Suggestion

**Your Priority Assessment:**
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Blocking business operations
- [ ] 🟠 High - Needed within 30 days
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Needed within 90 days
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Nice to have

**Willing to Contribute:**
<!-- Are you interested in helping implement this feature? -->
- [ ] Yes - I can help with development
- [ ] Yes - I can help with testing
- [ ] Yes - I can help with documentation
- [ ] Yes - I can provide design mockups
- [ ] No - Submitting request only

**Willing to Pay for Faster Development:**
<!-- Some features can be prioritized for sponsored development -->
- [ ] Yes - Interested in sponsored development
- [ ] No - Standard priority is fine
- [ ] Maybe - Would like to discuss options

### 🤝 Community Feedback
<!-- This section will be filled by the community -->
- 👍 Upvotes: [reactions count]
- 💬 Comments: [discussion link]

### 📋 Confirmation Checklist
<!-- Before submitting, please confirm -->
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this feature hasn't been requested
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this solves
- [ ] I have provided a detailed proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
- [ ] I have described the business value and use cases
- [ ] I have assessed technical considerations
- [ ] I understand this request will be reviewed and prioritized by the team

---
**Thank you for helping shape the future of 11 Avatar Digital Hub! 🚀**
Our product team reviews all feature requests and will respond within 5-7 business days.
